title: ESC Recommended Exercise of the Week #30
excerpt: Check out this solo practice routine with Coach Phillip. This routine will help you work on your service return, height awareness, short swing technique. Bring a stopwatch, print out the poster below and great ready to improve your game! https://www.squashcoachphillip.com/posters/spr-02-col.jpg
content:
Check out this solo practice routine with Coach Phillip. This routine will help you work on your service return, height awareness, short swing technique. Bring a stopwatch, print out the poster below and great ready to improve your game!
